# Pull Request

## Summary

Describe the change and why it is needed.

## Checklist

- [ ] My commits include `Signed-off-by` lines for DCO compliance.
- [ ] My contribution is submitted under AGPL-3.0-only.
- [ ] I have not added a Contributor License Agreement requirement.
- [ ] New dependencies are compatible with AGPL-3.0-only.
- [ ] The change preserves Clowder's scope-constrained safety model.
- [ ] The change does not add unmanaged autonomous testing behavior.
- [ ] Documentation has been updated where needed.

## Safety impact

Describe any effect on scope validation, approval gates, tool execution, evidence handling, or reporting.
